summary: Captured deterministic desktop browser screenshots for US-842 bidding, whist decision, contract play, all-pass play, misere play, deal-settlement, and next-deal states using a Vite-served fixture that imports production renderGame and styles. Visual review found no blank screens, no obvious text overlap or clipping, visible active actor/phase status, visible current trick or state area, and understandable legal action/card controls for each state.

tests_run.evidence: Started Vite on http://127.0.0.1:5331/ outside the sandbox after the sandbox blocked localhost binding with EPERM.

tests_run.command: Codex in-app browser screenshot capture at 1280x800 for phase-fixtures.html?fixture=bidding|whist|contract-play|all-pass|misere|deal-settlement|next-deal
tests_run.evidence: Captured seven real browser screenshots under task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1144/screenshots/. File checks reported 1280x800 image dimensions for every screenshot. Browser DOM diagnostics reported viewport 1280x800, nonblank body text, no text overflow items, and no text overlap pairs for every fixture.
All screenshot files are JPEG images at 1280x800 with nonzero file sizes.
Vitest passed 11 files / 101 tests, then tsc and vite build completed successfully.

verification_environment.dev_server: Vite via npm run dev at http://127.0.0.1:5331/

node_package_scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run build

verification_environment.notes: No backend or external service applies. Visual evidence uses deterministic local fixtures that import the production renderer and stylesheet through Vite.

quality_gate_matrix.expected: Desktop 1280x800 browser screenshots exist for bidding, whist decision, contract play, all-pass, misere, and trick-complete/deal-settlement or next-deal state.
quality_gate_matrix.evidence: Captured seven screenshots: 01-bidding.jpg, 02-whist-decision.jpg, 03-contract-play.jpg, 04-all-pass.jpg, 05-misere.jpg, 06-deal-settlement.jpg, and 07-next-deal.jpg. File checks confirmed 1280x800 dimensions.

quality_gate_matrix.expected: Legal action controls are visible and understandable in each state where human controls apply.
quality_gate_matrix.evidence: Bidding shows pass, misere, and bid controls; whist shows pass, whist, and half-whist; contract/all-pass/misere play show enabled legal card controls; settlement shows Подсчитать; next-deal shows Следующая сдача.

quality_gate_matrix.expected: The active actor and current phase/state are visible enough for the user to understand whose turn it is.
quality_gate_matrix.evidence: Every screenshot includes a footer such as Фаза: bidding/contract/play/deal-settlement/next-deal and Игрок: You. All-pass and misere deal family context is also visible in the left-side game log.

quality_gate_matrix.expected: The central table area is present and shows either the current trick or the current state message.
quality_gate_matrix.evidence: Bidding and whist show state messages; contract play shows two current-trick cards plus the play message; all-pass and misere show the play area; deal-settlement and next-deal show summary state messages.

quality_gate_matrix.expected: No obvious text overlap, clipping, or incoherent layout collision at 1280x800.
quality_gate_matrix.evidence: Manual screenshot review found no obvious overlap or clipping. Browser DOM diagnostics found zero text overflow items and zero text overlap pairs across all seven fixtures.

quality_gate_matrix.expected: Screenshots come from fixed fixture states that can be reloaded through a stable URL and production rendering code.
quality_gate_matrix.evidence: phase-fixtures.html and phase-fixtures.ts live under the task report directory, use query parameter fixture keys, fixed card/state objects, and import ../../src/ui/render plus ../../src/styles.css through Vite.

quality_gate_matrix.expected: Full project verification passes after visual fixture/artifact work.
quality_gate_matrix.evidence: npm run verify passed: 11 Vitest files / 101 tests, tsc, and vite build.
